item.title: Propelling aerospace applications with Xanadu’s PennyLane, Rolls-Royce, and AMD

item.title: Quantum computing for photodynamic cancer therapy

item.title: Xanadu Residency Program: The Launchpad for Tomorrow's Quantum Leaders
